title: Product QBR deck with usage and risk framing
prompt: Create a 9-slide product quarterly business review deck for Atlas AI Workspace. Explain what improved this quarter, where adoption is still weak, and which product bets should be prioritized next.
acceptanceNotes: The deck should connect product usage signals to business outcomes.
It should identify adoption risks without sounding alarmist.
It should include a plausible recommendation section, not just observations.
